message:
feat(python): numpy.fft.ifftn wrapper parity (franken_numpy-94r5)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.fft.ifftn covering the optional
shape tuple `s`, arbitrary axes selection (default: all axes), norm
conventions ('backward'/'ortho'/'forward'), and optional `out=`
destination. Test covers default invert on a 3-D spectrum,
s=(4,4,4) padding, axes=(-2,-1) subset, norm=ortho and forward,
1-D degradation to ifft, fftn∘ifftn round-trip, and a real input
fftn→ifftn real-part recovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
